channel.title: Thota and Associates · Insights
channel.description: Practitioner notes from our desk on valuations, taxation, corporate insolvency, and the evolving regulatory landscape.

item.title: The new Labour Codes and what they actually do to your CTC structure
item.description: The 50% wage rule has rewritten Indian payroll. Most CTC structures we audit are non-compliant in ways their owners haven't noticed yet. Here's what to look for.
